titleStmt.title: SII 18.183: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 183. (B.K. No. 59 of 1934-35.) NADIHARAḶHAḶḶI RANEBENNUR TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab set up in the temple of Sōmēs11vara.

summary.p: This inscription referring itself to the reign of Rāyamurāri Sōvidēva is dated in Śaka 109[5], Nandana, Śrāvaṇa śu. Thursday, Saṁkrānti. The tithi is not given. The Śaka year given is the current year. In śuddha-paksha of Śrāvaṇa in the year Nandana corresponding to A.D. 1172, Thursday occurred twice, once on July 27th on which day the tithi was 5, and again on 3rd August on which day the tithi 13 ended at ·71. But since the Siṁha-saṁkramaṇa occurred on the 27th July at ·60, the former seems to be the intended date.

It states that when Mahāpradhāna Kēsimayya-Daṇḍanāyaka was governing Banavāse Twelve-thousand, Dāvarasa, the Suṅkavergaḍe of Nariyaḷige and Nūṟuṁbāḍa, Suṁkavergaḍe Bammadēva and others made a gift of certain specified taxes to the basadi of Nāgagāvuṇḍa at Goṭṭagaḍi. This Nāgagavuṇḍa is apparently the same as the donor in No. 180. The gift was made under the instructions of Mahēśvaradēva, the Daṇḍanāyaka of hejjuṁka and vaḍḍarāvuḷa of Banavāse-nāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīmatu bhujabaḷacakravartti rāyamurāri sōvidēvarājya muttarōtta
rābhivriddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire . tatpādapadmōpajīvi . svasti śrīmanma
hasradhāna kēsimayyadaṇḍanāyakaru banavāse pannicchāsiramumaṁ duṣṭanigraha
siṣṭapratipāḷaneyiṁdāḷdarasugeyvuttamiralu . svasti śrīmatu banavāsenāḍa
hejjuṁkavaḍḍarāvuḷada daṁḍanāyaka mahēśvaradēvara besadiṁ śrīmatu Eḍava
ṭṭe baḷḷave nariyaḷige nūṟuṁbāḍada davasāyada suṁkaveggaḍe dāvarasaru maṁne yada suṁ
kaverggaḍe baṁmadēvanuṁ mahānāḍu nānādēsigaḷumirddu śrīmatu harihara dēvarutta
rada goṭṭagaḍiya nāgagāvuṁḍana basadige sakavarṣa 1095 neya naṁdanasaṁvatsarada śrāva
ṇa śuddhā brivāra saṁkrāṁti byatīpātadaṁdu dhārāpūrvvaka māḍikoṭṭa dharmma veṁteṁdaḍe naṁdā
dīvigegoṁdu gāṇadokkaludeṟe bharugiṁgeyaydettina pokkaludeṟe mūlesuṁka ṭhā ṇōga maṁne
yada suṁka Akkasāliyāyavinisuvaṁ sarvvanamaśyavāgi biṭṭarī dharmmamaṁ pratipāḷisi
davaru vāraṇāsiyalu sāsira kavileyumaṁ brāhmaṇarige koṭṭaphala Ī dharmmama
naḷidāta vāraṇāsiyalu sāvira kavileyuṁ brāhmaṇarumanaḷida pātakanappa .
Digital edition of SII 18.183 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
